## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the focused change that addresses it.

## Verification

List the commands and scenarios used to verify normal and failure behavior.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is limited to one logical concern.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior or the reported bug.
- [ ] Test, race, vet, and build commands pass locally.
- [ ] User-facing documentation and changelog were updated when needed.
- [ ] Linux and macOS compatibility were considered.
- [ ] The diff contains no tokens, secrets, or personal information.
